reviews.review_description: A very good interpretation of a common training experience, indeed it definitely shows off the potential of the technology.

Cool VR training. It really shows the potential for these kind of applications. I don't work in this field  but it was interesting to see what other people do.  It would be nice to see some more content though. Also if the go controller could be used to actually turn the wrenches that would be neat.

As a newly qualified telecommunication engineer this app helped me prepare for the dangers of working at height. Having never worked at height before I found the content most useful and am now aware of the perils I may face in my new career
